17 Ackowledgements

2026-03-21

Source: vignettes/articles/17_Acknowledgements.Rmd
17_Acknowledgements.Rmd

Thank you to anyone who has used AutoSpectral and provided feedback. In no particular order, here are some people who have helped or provided insights that allowed me to develop this tool: + Nathan Laniewski + Florian Mair + Andrew Konecny + Charlotte Christie Petersen + The Department of Pathology Flow Core at the University of Cambridge + The FACS Core at the University of Leuven (KUL) + Jochen Lamote + Jaromir Mikes + Florens Lohrmann + Ellie Tiplady + Alyssa Fears + Claude Chew + Samuel Granjeaud + Vincenzo Muraca + IJsbrand Reyneveld + Luis Machado Crisostomo + Dominica Bondanza + Federico Rivelli + Andre Heinen + Maximillian Sprang + Tina Sarkar + Juliese Menschuk + Teresa Von Linde + Andrieu Thibault + Camille Santa-Maria + Vaclav Gergelits + Marta Merlo + Marina Perez Gutierrez

Apologies if I’ve left you out or you would prefer not to be listed here–just let me know.

I am also indebted to prior work by David Novo, Bartek Rajwa, Ryan Kmet, Mario Roederer, Peter Mage, Chris Hall, Sofie Van Gassen and others. Flow cytometry is a great, collaborative field to be in.

This work was supported by the Medical Research Council grant MR/Y004450/1 through the MRC Proactive Vaccinology consortium IMMPROVE (https://immprove.ac.uk/), and the Wellcome Trust through Wellcome Investigator Award 222442/A/21/Z.

Developed by Oliver Burton, Adrian Liston.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
